reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve the quality and accuracy of my reasoning for future questions, which is a foundational skill for minimizing HP loss.

Unlocking 'pe_plan' adds a planning block and a reflection phase to my process. This will significantly increase my accuracy and provide a safety net (reflection) to correct errors before they cost HP, which is a vital long-term investment for the dungeon.
